Global.details: Opens Vim's built-in documentation for the specified command, setting, or concept.
Saves the current buffer to a new file name and switches the current buffer to that file.

Global.desc: Edit a file in a new buffer
Global.details: Opens the specified file for editing in the current window.

Global.desc: Quit (fails if there are unsaved changes)
Global.details: Closes the current window; if it's the last window, exits Vim. Fails if the file has been modified since the last save.

Global.desc: Quit and throw away unsaved changes
Global.details: Forcibly exits Vim without saving any modifications made during the session.
Saves the current changes to the disk.
Saves the current buffer's contents into a new or existing file without changing the current buffer's name.
Saves the changes and then exits Vim.

Global.desc: Write and quit (only writes if modified)
Global.details: Similar to :wq, but it only writes to the disk if there are actual changes to save.
A shortcut key sequence in Normal mode to save changes (if any) and exit.

Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor one character to the left.
Moves the cursor down one line.
Moves the cursor up one line.
Moves the cursor one character to the right.

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump forwards to the start of a word
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the beginning of the next word.

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump backwards to the start of a word
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the beginning of the previous word.

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump forwards to the end of a word
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the end of the current or next word.

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump to the start of the line
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the very first character of the current line (at index 0).

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump to the first non-blank character of the line
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the first character on the line that is not a space or tab.

Cursor Movement.desc: Jump to the end of the line
Cursor Movement.details: Moves the cursor to the last character of the current line.

Cursor Movement.desc: Go to the first line of the document
Cursor Movement.details: Jumps the cursor to the beginning of the first line in the file.

Cursor Movement.desc: Go to the last line of the document
Cursor Movement.details: Jumps the cursor to the beginning of the last line in the file.
Moves the cursor directly to the specified line number.

Insert Mode.details: Enters Insert mode at the current cursor position.

Insert Mode.desc: Insert at the beginning of the line
Insert Mode.details: Moves the cursor to the first non-blank character of the line and enters Insert mode.
Enters Insert mode immediately after the current cursor position.

Insert Mode.desc: Insert (append) at the end of the line
Insert Mode.details: Moves the cursor to the end of the line and enters Insert mode.

Insert Mode.desc: Append a new line below the current line
Insert Mode.details: Creates a new empty line below the current one and enters Insert mode.

Insert Mode.desc: Append a new line above the current line
Insert Mode.details: Creates a new empty line above the current one and enters Insert mode.

Insert Mode.desc: Insert (append) at the end of the word
Insert Mode.details: Moves to the end of the current word and enters Insert mode to append text.
Returns to Normal mode from Insert or Visual mode.

Editing.details: Replaces the character under the cursor with the next character you type.
Deletes the current line and enters Insert mode.

Editing.desc: Change (replace) to the end of the word
Editing.details: Deletes from the cursor to the end of the word and enters Insert mode.
Removes the character directly under the cursor.
Removes the entire current line and stores it in the register (clipboard).

Editing.desc: Delete (cut) to the end of the word
Editing.details: Removes text from the cursor to the start of the next word.
Copies the entire current line into the register.

Editing.desc: Yank (copy) to the end of the word
Editing.details: Copies text from the cursor to the end of the current word.
Inserts the contents of the register after the cursor position or below the current line.
Inserts the contents of the register before the cursor position or above the current line.
Reverses the last change made to the document.
Re-applies the change that was recently undone.

Search and Replace.details: Searches for the next occurrence of a string or regular expression towards the end of the file.
Searches for the previous occurrence of a string or regular expression towards the beginning of the file.
Jumps to the next match of the previous search pattern.
Jumps to the previous match of the previous search pattern.

Search and Replace.desc: Replace all old with new throughout file
Search and Replace.details: Searches for every occurrence of 'old' and replaces it with 'new' in the entire document.

Search and Replace.desc: Replace all old with new with confirmations
Search and Replace.details: Performs a global search and replace, but prompts you to confirm each individual change.

Visual Mode.details: Enters Visual mode to select text character by character.
Enters Visual mode to select entire lines at a time.
Enters Visual mode to select a rectangular block of text.
Copies the currently selected text in Visual mode.
Deletes the currently selected text in Visual mode.
Toggles the case (uppercase/lowercase) of the selected text or the character under the cursor.
